response.original_title: Eric Johnson Live at Fort Wayne
response.overview: Guitarist legend Eric Johnson performed in Fort Wayne, Indiana on Friday, October 24, 2025. The concert was held at the Clyde Theatre as part of his Texaphonic Tour. AI Mode conversation: Eric Johnson Fort Wayne 2025You said: Eric Johnson Fort Wayne 2025Guitarist legend Eric Johnson performed in Fort Wayne, Indiana on Friday, October 24, 2025. The concert was held at the Clyde Theatre as part of his Texaphonic Tour.The event featured the Grammy-winning artist performing classic hits like "Cliffs of Dover" alongside material from his double-album The Book of Making/Yesterday Meets Today.
